name: sql
context: SQL database operations — query, migrate, seed, and manage relational databases
info: Covers PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite. Skills include: raw query execution, parameterized queries, schema migrations (up/down), seed data insertion, index management, connection pooling, and transaction handling. Supports both direct connections and connection strings.

scripts.name: Execute SQL Query
scripts.description: Run a parameterized SQL query against a database

author: dojo-community
